name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the pie crust in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 15 minutes.
2. Boil the sweet potatoes until tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Cool the potatoes, peel them, and mash with butter.
4. Add eggs, sugar, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla to the mashed potatoes and mix well.
5. Pour or scrape the mixture into an unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake in a 325°F (165°C) oven for 30 minutes.
